name: TATA IPL 2026: Match 31 | Sunrisers Hyderabad vs Delhi Capitals
description: Get set for another action-packed night as the Sunrisers Hyderabad takes on Delhi Capitals in a clash that promises edge-of-the-seat action and unforgettable moments. As they take on a determined Delhi side, fans can expect a fierce battle packed with big hits, crucial wickets, and momentum swings that define T20 cricket at its best.

name: Let There Be Guitar 2026: Rhythm Shaw, Dad N' Daughter, and Chirag Todi

raw_data.title: Let There Be Guitar 2026: Rhythm Shaw, Dad N' Daughter, and Chirag Todi
raw_data.category: **RHYTHM SHAW** : Rhythm, a 29-year-old guitarist based in Mumbai, has been recognized as a prodigy since his youth, earning attention and praise at international competitions. In addition to his exceptional guitar skills, he is also classically trained in tabla, demonstrating remarkable versatility and musical depth. With strong technical proficiency and a deep understanding of both instruments, Rhythm has established himself as a successful musician who seamlessly navigates multiple genres. His talent has taken him on tours around the world, where he has performed for diverse audiences. Along the way, he has had the privilege of collaborating with renowned artists such as **A.R. Rahman** , **Louiz Banks** , **Peter Finger** , **Zakir Hussain** , **Shankar Mahadevan** , and **Mohini Dey** , further solidifying his reputation in the music industry.
